title: Disable auto-commit in orchestrator tests and isolate commit-specific coverage
description: Set RepositoryStorage._auto_commit = False at module import time in tests/test_orchestrator.py and ensure BeadAutoCommitTests explicitly re-enable and restore the flag so commit-behavior tests remain isolated.
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_orchestrator.py sets RepositoryStorage._auto_commit = False at module scope for the main test session.
BeadAutoCommitTests explicitly enables auto-commit for tests that verify git commit behavior and restores prior state afterward if needed.
General orchestrator tests no longer rely on live git commits as an incidental side effect.
